mapper.select: /* CHAT 대화방 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatRoomList */ SELECT A.ROOM_ID AS ROOM_ID , A.ROOM_TITLE AS TITLE , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT , A.LAST_CHAT_DT AS LAST_CHAT_DT FROM TB_CHAT_ROOM A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.LAST_CHAT_DT DESC

/* 모델 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectModelList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID AS VALUE , A.MODEL_NAME AS LABEL , A.PROVIDER_ID , A.VERSION , A.INPUT_COST , A.OUTPUT_COST , A.USE_YN , A.DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORDER , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_LLM_MDL A ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER

/* RAG 데이터 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectRagDsList */ SELECT A.DATASET_ID AS VALUE , A.DS_NM AS LABEL , A.DESCRIPTION , A.VERSION , A.CHUNK_ALGO_CD , A.CHUNK_SIZE , A.CHUNK_OVERLAP , A.MIN_CHUNK_SZ , A.HDR_INCL_CD , A.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD , A.EMBED_MODEL_CD , A.VECTOR_DB_CD , A.EMBED_NORM_CD , A.POOL_STRAT_CD , A.DIM_REDUC_CD , A.CHUNK_CNT , A.SRCH_QUAL , A.SORT_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD = '003'

/* 데이터마트 조회 ai.chatbot.selectDmList */ SELECT A.DATAMART_ID AS VALUE , A.DM_NM AS LABEL , A.DESCRIPTION , A.USE_YN , A.SORT_ORD , A.DB_TYPE , A.DB_VERSION , A.HOST , A.PORT , A.DB_NM , A.USERNAME , A.PWD_ENC , A.SCH_NM , A.CONN_OPT , A.READONLY_YN , A.IP_WLIST_YN , A.SSL_YN , A.TBL_CNT , A.LAST_VERIFY_DT , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DM A ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: /* CHAT 대화방 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRoom */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_TITLE, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT, LAST_CHAT_DT) VALUES (#{roomTitle}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())

/* CHAT 대화방 로그 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatLog */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_LOG ( ROOM_ID, SVC_TY, REF_ID, Q_CONTENT, R_CONTENT, IN_TOKENS, OUT_TOKENS, SATIS_YN, TTSQ, TABLE_DATA, REASK_CNT, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{svcTy}, #{refId}, #{qContent}, #{rContent}, #{inTokens}, #{outTokens}, #{satisYn}, #{sql}, #{tableData}, #{reaskCnt}, #{userId}, NOW() )
/* CHAT 대화방 참조 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRef */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_REF ( LOG_ID, DOC_ID, MAIN_PAGE_NO, RELATED_PAGES, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{docId}, #{mainPageNo}, #{relatedPages}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* CHAT 대화방 로그 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatLogList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.IN_TOKENS , A.OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.SATIS_CONTENT , A.SATIS_DT , A.TTSQ , A.REASK_CNT , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , B.DOC_ID , CASE WHEN A.SVC_TY = 'M' AND B.DOC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DOC_EXIST , CASE WHEN A.TTSQ IS NOT NULL AND A.TABLE_DATA IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TABLE_EXIST FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CHAT_REF B ON B.LOG_ID = A.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC

/* CHAT 대화방 참조 문서 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatDocList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.DOC_ID , A.MAIN_PAGE_NO , A.RELATED_PAGES , A.CREATE_DT , B.DOC_TITLE , B.FILE_PATH , B.FILE_NAME FROM TB_CHAT_REF A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOC B ON B.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}

/* CHAT 대화방 tableData 조회 ai.chatbot.selectTableDataList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.IN_TOKENS , A.OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.TTSQ , A.REASK_CNT , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , A.TABLE_DATA FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}

/* 채팅 로그 단건 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatLogByLogId */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.TTSQ , A.TABLE_DATA , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.insert: /* 지식 카드 등록 ai.chatbot.insertKnowledgeCard */ INSERT INTO TB_KNOW_CARD ( CARD_ID, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, LOG_ID, SVC_TY, TITLE, TAGS, PIN_YN, ARCHIVE_YN, ARCHIVE_DT, SORT_ORD, SQL_CODE, USE_YN, CREATE_DT, MODIFY_DT ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{logId}, #{svcTy}, #{title}, #{tags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pinYn}, #{archiveYn}, #{archiveDt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sortOrd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sqlCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: /* 지식 카테고리 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectKnowledgeList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_NM , A.COLOR , A.SORT_ORD , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_KNOW_CAT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD
